title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 631.095 - Comprehensive substance treatment and rehabilitation program — department of social services may seek IMD exclusion waiver
text:
631.095.  Comprehensive substance treatment and rehabilitation program — department of social services may seek IMD exclusion waiver. — The department of social services may seek a waiver of the Institutions for Mental Disease (IMD) exclusion for the comprehensive substance treatment and rehabilitation program as administered by the department of mental health.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1414 § 1 merged with H.B. 1682 § 2)
